description: Expression languages allowed in the structured Condition type (SPECIFICATION §V) used by when / handoff.condition / triggers.filter / human_in_the_loop.trigger. Platforms advertise supported languages in their Platform Manifest (capabilities.orchestration.condition_languages[]).
registration_policy: Specification Required. A registered language MUST have a public, versioned grammar/spec and deterministic evaluation semantics. LLM-interpreted 'languages' are NOT eligible — that is what the bare-string hint form is for.

entries.eval: Evaluate the JSONPath query against the input/payload; truthy if it yields a non-empty result.
Evaluate the JMESPath query; truthy if the result is truthy.
Common Expression Language boolean expression over the payload.
Evaluate the JsonLogic rule object against the payload.
